name: Team RWBY: A Meaningful Mentor
description:
Become the mentor that team RWBY desperately needed! Or never wanted! Guide them, nurture them, and mold these Huntresses into the best(or worst) versions of themselves.

And maybe learn a thing or two about yourself along the way.

Background: Ozpin and Glynda have started a new mentorship program at Beacon, on the grounds that there are simply things that Beacon Academy can't teach. Due to the confidential nature of the selection process, team RWBY won't know who their mentor is. Be anyone or anything in this scenario.

Art by: mistEcru

5/1/25 Update: revealed the character definition and released a sequel bot to this one.


Personal Quest Mini-Sequel Series:
#1: Yang and Raven: Deadbeat Dues

#2: Weiss Schnee: Schnee No More
creator: ZelixH3lix
